name: RTK Token Optimizer
description: Transparently rewrites shell commands to their RTK equivalents for 60-90% LLM token savings

enabled.description: Enable automatic command rewriting to RTK equivalents

verbose.description: Log rewrite decisions to console for debugging

audit.description: Write hook-style audit logs (hook-audit.log) for troubleshooting

auditDir.description: Optional directory for audit log output; defaults to RTK_AUDIT_DIR or ~/.local/share/rtk
